## Meeting Purpose

[Unblock the SEO content workflow and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Unblocked:** Dhruv approved a new workflow: content publishes after Callie's review, unblocking the CEO bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Metrics:** SEO impact is expected in \~3 months (traffic) and \~6 months (nuanced analysis). Dhruv needs this data for the Series B data room.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Post-blog, the next focus is programmatic SEO (PSEO), targeting long-tail use cases (e.g., "make an app for healthcare").](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Meetings move to Thursdays at 2 PM PST, shifting to bi-weekly in January.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Series B Needs

  - [**Context:** Dhruv is focused on a Series B fundraise, requiring SEO performance data for the data room.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Goal:** Track meaningful metrics beyond clicks, specifically subscribes and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Timeline for SEO Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [**\~3 Months:** Consistent upward trends in engagement and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**\~6 Months:** Nuanced analysis of content pillars to refine strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Early Signals:** A recent engagement spike is a positive sign. Katya will research the site's authority to better predict the timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Workflow & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Problem:** Dhruv's CEO approval was the bottleneck preventing content publication.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow was approved → Content publishes after Callie's review, unblocking the process.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Double content delivery to cover the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Week of Dec 29:** No new content will be published.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Week of Christmas:** No meeting; Katya will send an async update.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

### Future SEO Strategy: Programmatic SEO (PSEO)

  - [**Goal:** Expand beyond blog content to other high-impact SEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Focus:** Programmatic SEO (PSEO), targeting long-tail use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Examples:** Glossary pages, use-case specific landing pages (e.g., "make an app for healthcare").](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Timeline:** PSEO planning will begin in January, after the blog workflow is fully established.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Meeting Cadence

  - [**New Time:** Thursdays at 2 PM PST.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Meet to ensure a smooth holiday transition.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Starting Jan:** Shift to bi-weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Research the site's authority to refine the SEO impact timeline; share findings next week.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Deliver double the content next week to cover the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [Begin PSEO planning in January.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Update the calendar invite to the new time (Thursdays at 2 PM PST).](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Dhruv:**](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Ensure Callie is aware of the new content approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/XbU9x2txWsHFcrqT_CkMtyF-YEFrBqJx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
